inputs.label: Heart Girth (cm)
inputs.businessContext: Measure the circumference of the horse's chest just behind the elbows and withers.

businessContext_i18n.en: Measure the circumference of the horse's chest just behind the elbows and withers.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Atın göğsünün çevresini dirseklerin ve omuzların hemen arkasından ölçün.

inputs.label: Body Length (cm)
inputs.businessContext: Measure from the point of shoulder to the point of buttock in a straight line.

businessContext_i18n.en: Measure from the point of shoulder to the point of buttock in a straight line.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Omuz noktasından kalça noktasına düz bir çizgide ölçün.

inputs.label: Height at Withers (cm)
inputs.businessContext: Measure from the ground to the highest point of the withers (optional).

businessContext_i18n.en: Measure from the ground to the highest point of the withers (optional).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yerden omuzların en yüksek noktasına kadar ölçün (isteğe bağlı).

inputs.label: Age (years)
inputs.businessContext: Age of the horse in years (optional).

businessContext_i18n.en: Age of the horse in years (optional).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
